user_query: I'm organizing a book club meeting and I would like to share an interesting article with the members. Could you extract the main article and meta data from this blog post: 'https://rapidapi.com/blog/rapidapi-marketplace-is-now-rapidapi-hub/'? Additionally, I would appreciate it if you could provide me with a random verse from the Bible to discuss during the meeting.

TaskList.description: Extract the main article content and meta data from the provided blog post URL.
Fetch a random verse from the Bible to be discussed in the meeting.
